candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
An experiment is performed to evaluate the amount of DNA present during a complete cell cycle. All of the cells were synced prior to the start of the experiment. During the experiment, a fluorescent chemical was applied to cells, which would fluoresce only when bound to DNA. The results of the experiment are shown above. Differences in cell appearance by microscopy or changes in detected DNA were determined to be phases of the cell cycle and are labeled with the letters A-D.
What phase in the experiment corresponds to the cell undergoing anaphase?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 进行实验以评估完整细胞周期中存在的DNA量。在实验开始时,所有细胞均处于同步状态。实验过程中,将荧光化学物质应用于细胞,仅在与DNA结合时发出荧光。实验结果如图所示。通过显微镜观察或检测到的DNA量变化,确定细胞外观的差异对应于细胞周期的不同阶段,并用字母A-D标记。实验中哪个阶段对应于经历后期的细胞?(答案是一个字母)
metadata.explanation_zh: 后期是细胞周期中重复的染色体分离并向细胞两极移动的阶段。这发生在染色体在S期(合成期)复制并在前一个前期阶段缩短之后。在后期,遗传物质在两个子细胞之间均等分配,导致每个子细胞中的遗传物质量相比原始母细胞减少。因此,D期在遗传物质量下降之前,对应于细胞周期中的后期。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt clearly asks which labeled phase (A-D) matches anaphase, and the graph is readable enough to understand the labeled DNA-content phases across the cell cycle. The expected answer format is a single phase label.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
